raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024. I was not at the Macy 's store at the XXXX area, XXXX Tx, yet my Macy 's card was used to shop for a charge of {$100000.00}. These are charges that I never used, and it's a fraud, I contacted Mac'y and the supervisor that called me back told me it is denied because you had your card with you. I believe Macy 's should do a thorough investigation to find out who used this card, I requested the store to generate the original receipt and I was denied. Macy 's also threatened that they will report this to credit bureau. I think this is not ethical and I am requesting the CFPB to investigate this further.
